The Philosophy

Refine Your
Natural Beauty.

Unlock the most radiant version of yourself. Nestled in the heart of Kampala & Juba, we seamlessly merge cutting-edge clinical technology with the delicate art of aesthetic refinement.

Guided by the expert hands of Dr. Chirag Kotecha, we promise nothing short of excellence. His touch transforms, uplifts, and rejuvenates—setting the benchmark for aesthetic care in the region.

Discover Our Clinic

Dr. C. Kotecha

Lead Specialist

Board-Certified

Doctors

4 Locations

Kampala · Juba

FDA-Approved

Equipment

15+ Years

Experience

10,000+

Patients

Award-Winning

East Africa

Mastery Across Specialties

A World of Treatments.

From advanced skin rejuvenation to medical weight loss and hormone optimization — every service you need under one roof.

Skin & Face

Botox®, fillers, HydraFacial, peels, microneedling, CO2 laser.

Explore

Hair Restoration

FUE transplant, PRP, eyebrow & beard transplant, microblading.

Explore

Body & Sculpt

Liposuction, tummy tuck, BBL, mommy makeover, EM sculpt.

Explore

Wellness & IV

Weight loss, BHRT, NAD+ IV, Myers' cocktails, NAD+ longevity.

Explore
Why Refine

Where Science Meets Artistry.

We don't just treat skin — we sculpt confidence. Every consultation begins with listening, every plan is personalized, and every result is delivered with the precision and care that has made us East Africa's most trusted aesthetic destination.

Specialist-Led, Always

Every treatment is performed or directly supervised by a board-certified specialist — never a junior, never a trainee.

FDA-Approved Technology

From our CO2 fractional laser to our cryolipolysis systems, every device meets the strictest international safety standards.

Bespoke Treatment Plans

No two patients are the same. Your plan is built around your anatomy, goals, lifestyle, and timeline — never a one-size-fits-all package.

Concierge Aftercare

From your first consult to your final follow-up, our team is on call — including dedicated WhatsApp lines and home-visit recovery.

The Doctors

Masters of the Craft.

Meet Full Team

Dermatologist

Dr. Chirag Kotecha

Aesthetic Physician

Dr. Henry Owiny

Plastic Surgeon

Dr. William Lubega

Nutritionist

Wendy Emyedu

Dermatologist

Dr. Vicky Koojo Nganzi
Your Refine Journey

A Calm, Confident Path.

From your first WhatsApp message to your final follow-up — every step is designed to feel luxurious, transparent, and effortless.

01

Consultation

A complimentary 30-min conversation with a specialist to understand your goals and medical history.

02

Bespoke Plan

A fully personalized protocol with timeline, pricing, and expected outcomes — no surprises.

03

Treatment

Your procedure in our serene clinic — performed by specialists using world-class technology.

04

Aftercare

Concierge follow-up with WhatsApp access to your team and scheduled check-ins for life.

Refine IV Lounge

Wellness, Delivered Directly.

Step into East Africa's most premium IV therapy lounge. Settle into a plush chair with herbal tea, and let our nurses deliver a customized cocktail of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants — for absorption and energy that oral supplements simply cannot match.

  • Myers' Magic, NAD+, Inner Beauty, Glutathione
  • Vitamin shots & iron infusions
  • Mobile service to your home, hotel, or office
  • 30–60 minute sessions · 100% absorption
Visit the Lounge Book Mobile IV
Begin Today

Your Most Radiant Self Awaits.

Book a complimentary consultation with one of our specialists. We'll listen to your goals, answer your questions, and craft a personalized plan — with no pressure and no obligation.

Book Free Consultation Chat on WhatsApp

+211-922-687-111 juba@refineskinandbody.com

East Africa's premier destination for
aesthetic, dermatological & wellness care.

From advanced skin rejuvenation and hair restoration to medical weight loss and IV therapy — we blend world-class technology with the artistry of personalised care, across four locations in Kampala and Juba.
